title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: Tutorial on setting up and using Claude Code with Ollama to build agentic AI applications locally without paid APIs. Demonstrates installation, LLM selection, and construction of a multi-agent travel application with Flask UI.
